_comment: Optional configuration file for GECKO. Values here override built-in defaults. IMPORTANT: When updating to a new release, note down any custom values you have set here and re-apply them to the new config.json — releases always ship with default values. Delete this file to use all defaults.

_comments.KINARM_INVALID_ABS_THRESHOLD: Absolute threshold for treating a gaze value as invalid/missing (sentinel cleaning)
_comments.DEFAULT_GAZE_LOWPASS_CUTOFF_HZ: Cutoff frequency for gaze low-pass filter in Hz
_comments.DEFAULT_GAZE_LOWPASS_ORDER: Filter order (effective order is doubled internally by filtfilt)
_comments.DEFAULT_SAVGOL_WINDOW: Savitzky-Golay window length in frames (must be odd)
_comments.DEFAULT_SAVGOL_POLYORDER: Savitzky-Golay polynomial order for angular velocity derivatives
_comments.DEFAULT_EYE_HEIGHT_M: Eye height above stimulus plane in meters
_comments.DEFAULT_VISUAL_ANGLE_DEG: Foveal cone half-angle in degrees (FVR threshold)
_comments.AUTO_INTERP_THRESHOLD_FRAMES: Gaps <= this many frames are auto-filled with linear interpolation
_comments.SACCADIC_TRANSITION_FRACTION: Fraction of gap used for sigmoid blend in saccadic interpolation
_comments.SACCADIC_SIGMOID_STEEPNESS: Sigmoid steepness for saccadic interpolation (higher = sharper)
_comments.MAX_LABELER_CHANNELS: Maximum overlay channels shown in the gaze labeler including Gaze_X and Gaze_Y
_comments.DEFAULT_TIMESTAMP_SPACING_S: Default timestamp spacing in seconds (1ms for typical 1000Hz KINARM data)
